user.title: Ecovacs Open Platform
user.description: Create an API key (AK) at https://open.ecovacs.com (or open.ecovacs.cn for Mainland China), then enter it below.

data_description.api_key: Server AK from the Ecovacs Open Platform console
data_description.api_url: Must match the region where your Ecovacs account lives

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Check the API key and region.
error.no_devices: No robots found for this API key.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured
